testcase.name: CopywritingAgent step7 real LLM > (a) step7 mode — markdown has # heading · schema valid · cost_log agentMode=step7 · tokens > 0
CopywritingAgent step7 real LLM > (b) fallback mock schema alignment — CopywritingAgent.fallbackTemplate.step7 satisfies CopywritingOutputSchema
CopywritingAgent fallback schema alignment (no key) > step7 fallback satisfies CopywritingOutputSchema
LivestreamAgent real LLM > (a) generate_plan — 6-module JSON schema strict · cost_log agentMode=generate_plan · tokens > 0
LivestreamAgent real LLM > (b) optimize_script — 2 InfoCard schema strict · cost_log agentMode=optimize_script · tokens > 0
LivestreamAgent fallback schema alignment (no key) > generate_plan fallback satisfies GeneratePlanOutputSchema
LivestreamAgent fallback schema alignment (no key) > optimize_script fallback satisfies OptimizeScriptOutputSchema
LivestreamAgent fallback schema alignment (no key) > default fallback satisfies LivestreamOutputSchema
